title: Authentic Turkish Creator Shock Reaction
description: A high-speed, genuine 'shock' moment of a beautiful Turkish creator. Features fast reflex movement, realistic skin textures, and a clean plate look for social media.

prompt.concept: Authentic, high-speed human reaction. A beautiful Turkish creator has a genuine 'shock' moment. The movement is a fast reflex, not a staged pose. High-quality clean plate for social media.

character.hair: honey blonde, messy-chic, natural volume, slightly tousled as if she just moved her head
character.skin: natural skin texture, realistic pores, soft glowy makeup, slightly flushed cheeks from the 'shock' adrenaline
character.eyes: blue, wide-open, pupils dilated, eyebrows raised high in genuine surprise
character.expression: dynamic shock. Starts with a sharp intake of breath (gasp), eyes widening instantly, followed by a reflexive hand cover

wardrobe.top: simple grey or beige ribbed turtleneck, high-quality fabric, no logos
wardrobe.nails: vibrant cherry red nails, almond shape (matching the reference vibe)

details: slight motion blur in the background to emphasize her quick movement

camera.angle: eye level, handheld feel for realism (slight, natural micro-shakes)
camera.lens_feel: iPhone 15 Pro front camera, 1x zoom, sharp focus on eyes

lighting.key: bright natural light, catching the 'sparkle' in her eyes (catchlights)

action_timeline.beat: Sudden gasp: her mouth snaps open, chest rises slightly, eyes pop wide in 0.1 seconds. Instant reaction.
Reflexive movement: Her hand (with red nails) darts up from below the frame to her face. The movement is fast and slightly blurred, like a real human reflex.
Impact and Hold: Her palm hits her mouth softly, fingers slightly spread. She blinks rapidly once or twice while looking at the camera, chest settling as she holds the 'I can't believe it' look.

gesture_rules.movement_style: Fast, jerky, and reflexive. Not a smooth 'dance' movement, but a sudden human twitch.
realism_ticks: micro-expressions around the eyes (crows feet appearing during the gasp)
hand doesn't glide; it snaps to the face

no_text_no_graphics.note: Zero text, zero UI, zero watermarks. Pure raw footage.
